mapper.select: SELECT club.id as userId, club.username, club.deleted, club.email, club.university, club.nickname, club.created_at as createdAt, club.modified_at as modifiedAt FROM club WHERE club.id = #{id}
SELECT club.id, club.username, club.deleted, club.created_at as createdAt, club.modified_at as modifiedAt FROM club WHERE club.id is not NULL
